description_long: This bridge features a prominent arch structure composed of light-colored metal trusses, supported at both ends by solid rectangular concrete abutments. The arch rises gracefully above the deck, with a lattice of diagonal and vertical truss members providing structural integrity and visual interest. The bridge lacks a traditional deck or roadway, instead showcasing the open truss framework as its main visual element. There are no visible railings or guardrails, giving the bridge a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The materials appear to be primarily steel for the truss and concrete for the supports, with no decorative elements or lighting fixtures present. The overall design suggests a modern, functional approach suitable for spanning moderate distances in urban environments.
description: A modern arch truss bridge with light-colored metal framework and solid concrete supports, featuring an open, minimalist design with no visible railings or lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arch truss structure and both concrete abutments.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the bridge and the depth of the truss framework.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the arch and supporting abutments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and truss depth.
attribute_railing_design: no visible railing or guardrail present
